metadata.description: Modality-based Claude Code skills that recalibrate agents toward compiler-grade craft and scope discipline.

plugins.name: safer
plugins.description: 17 skills (architect, docs-reader, dogfood, implement-{junior,senior,staff}, investigate, orchestrate, research, review-senior, setup, spec, spike, stamina, typescript, ux-audit, verify) plus 15 bin/ utilities. Composes with eslint-plugin-agent-code-guard (lint floor) and zapbot (publish).
